summary: Iteration 159: Secret Rotation API - All 21 tests passed. Verified complete rotation lifecycle: initiate → test → activate → rollback. Security rules enforced: cannot activate untested/failed versions, audit trail records all actions, alerts fired on failures/rollbacks.
critical_code_review_comments: Rotation flow correctly enforces: initiate → test → activate sequence
Security rule: Cannot activate version with status 'pending_test' - returns clear error
Security rule: Cannot activate version with status 'test_failed' - returns clear error
Exely provider validates required fields (api_key, hotel_id) - empty values fail test
HotelRunner provider validates token length (min 10 chars) - short tokens fail test
Rollback fires alert via AlertingEngine with severity='warning'
Test failure fires alert via AlertingEngine with severity='high'
All rotation actions logged to secret_rotation_audit collection with actor, timestamp, version
Encrypted credentials stored in secret_rotation_versions collection
Dashboard correctly shows secrets with expiration status (overdue/warning/healthy)
Ops endpoints protected by require_ops_access guard (super_admin, admin, operator, manager roles)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with unique paths like 'syroce/dev/cm/test-agent-{random}/exely/prop-{random}' to avoid collision
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 159 verified Secret Rotation API. All 8 endpoints tested: (1) POST /api/ops/secrets/rotation/initiate creates pending_test version, (2) POST /api/ops/secrets/rotation/test validates credentials (Exely: api_key+hotel_id, HotelRunner: token length), (3) POST /api/ops/secrets/rotation/activate only works for test_passed versions, (4) POST /api/ops/secrets/rotation/rollback restores previous version and fires alert, (5) GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/status shows version history, (6) GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/dashboard shows all secrets with expiration info, (7) GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/overdue lists overdue secrets, (8) GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/audit shows rotation audit trail. Full flow tested: v1 initiate→test→activate, v2 initiate→test→activate, rollback to v1. Security rules verified: cannot skip test step, cannot activate failed tests.

rotation_initiate.encrypts_credentials: using crypto service with AAD context

rotation_test.generic_validation: all fields must be non-empty strings

rotation_activate.archives_previous: sets old active version to archived

rotation_status.returns: version history with status, created_at, test_result

rotation_dashboard.returns: all secrets with expiration info, overdue/warning/healthy status

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real MongoDB. Exely client not available in test env so structural validation is used (checks for non-empty api_key, hotel_id). HotelRunner uses token length validation.
